pages.text: 咘咘有一个小习惯。每次紧张的时候，她就会咬嘴唇。咬得紧紧的，小嘴巴都红了。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a small white baby bunny (snow-white fur, pink inner ears, big brown eyes) in a light pink summer dress with pink bow on head, biting her lower lip nervously, standing alone in a sunlit meadow, spring flowers around, anxious expression, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 怕打雷的时候，咬嘴唇。怕黑的时候，咬嘴唇。不认识的叔叔阿姨来了，也咬嘴唇。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, three small panels in one image: a white baby bunny in pink summer dress hiding under blanket during lightning, same bunny in dark room hugging a stuffed toy, same bunny hiding behind a door peeking at adult animal silhouettes, all showing lip-biting nervousness, warm children's picture book style, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 今天，森林里要办一个小小音乐会。NOMI 说："咘咘，你来唱一首歌好不好？"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a raccoon (gray-brown fur, black eye mask, ringed tail) wearing a light blue-and-white striped T-shirt, excitedly showing a colorful poster of a forest concert to a small white baby bunny in pink summer dress, sunny spring forest clearing with wildflowers, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 咘咘一听就紧张了，马上咬住嘴唇。"不要不要！好多人看着我，我害怕！"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a small white baby bunny in pink summer dress biting her lip hard, shaking her head with eyes squeezed shut, hands waving in refusal, raccoon in blue striped T-shirt looking at her gently, spring meadow background, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: NOMI 蹲下来，轻轻握住咘咘的手："没关系，害怕是正常的。NOMI 教你一个魔法好不好？"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a raccoon in blue striped T-shirt kneeling down and gently holding both hands of a nervous white baby bunny in pink summer dress, eye-to-eye level, warm sunlight filtering through spring leaves, tender caring moment, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: "深深吸一口气——像闻一朵花一样。"咘咘吸了一口气。"再慢慢吐出来——像吹一个泡泡一样。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny in pink summer dress and a raccoon in blue striped T-shirt sitting in a flower field, the bunny smelling a big daisy flower with eyes closed peacefully, then blowing gently with a soap bubble floating away, spring sunshine, calming peaceful scene, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 吸——吐——吸——吐——咘咘做了三次。奇怪，心跳好像没那么快了，嘴唇也不想咬了。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny in pink summer dress sitting cross-legged in a meadow with eyes closed, a soft warm golden glow around her chest area showing calm heartbeat, three small flower-shaped bubbles floating up, peaceful spring scene, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: Sam 爸爸走过来说："咘咘，你知道吗？爸爸小时候也会害怕。上台的时候腿都在发抖呢。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a golden retriever (Sam papa) wearing a casual light cotton T-shirt, sitting on a log next to a small white baby bunny in pink summer dress, the dog making a funny scared face and pointing at his own knees, both in a sunny spring forest clearing, warm father-daughter moment, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: "真的吗？爸爸也会害怕？"咘咘睁大了眼睛。"当然啦。每个人都会害怕，害怕不丢人。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny in pink summer dress looking up at a golden retriever with wide surprised eyes and mouth open, the golden retriever nodding warmly with a reassuring smile, sitting on a log together, spring dappled sunlight, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: Tina 妈妈也来了："妈妈第一次做蛋糕的时候，手都在抖。但是慢慢做，一步一步来，最后做出了一个好大的蛋糕！"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a black-and-white spotted cow (Tina mama) wearing a light spring floral dress with short sleeves, kneeling and gesturing with hands showing a big circle shape for cake, talking to a white baby bunny who listens intently, golden retriever nearby smiling, spring forest setting, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: "慢慢来？"咘咘小声说。"对呀，不用急，慢慢来就好。"妈妈亲了亲咘咘的额头。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a black-and-white cow in spring floral dress kissing the forehead of a small white baby bunny in pink summer dress, the bunny with a small gentle smile starting to form, warm golden spring light, the most tender motherly moment, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 音乐会开始了。豆豆先上台，用树叶吹了一首曲子。小刺猬吹完以后，开心地跑下来："一点也不可怕！"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a small brown hedgehog (Doudou) standing on a tiny wooden stage decorated with spring flowers and bunting, blowing on a green leaf like a whistle, audience of cute forest animals watching from log seats, sunny spring outdoor concert setting, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 慢慢也上台了，唱了一首很慢很慢的歌。大家都笑了，因为慢慢什么都慢慢的，但是很可爱。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a small green turtle (Manman) with dark green shell on the wooden stage, singing with mouth wide open and eyes closed happily, musical notes floating slowly in the air, animal audience laughing warmly, spring outdoor concert, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 轮到咘咘了。咘咘站在台下，小手又开始抖了。她又想咬嘴唇了。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny in pink summer dress standing at the side of the stage, hands trembling slightly, about to bite lip, looking at the stage with wide nervous eyes, other animals in the audience looking at her encouragingly, spring concert setting, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: NOMI 在旁边小声说："记得魔法吗？闻花花，吹泡泡。"咘咘深深吸了一口气，慢慢吐出来。好了，没那么怕了。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a raccoon in blue striped T-shirt whispering into the ear of a white baby bunny, the bunny taking a deep breath with eyes closed and a small smile, a magical sparkle effect around her, backstage of the spring outdoor concert, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 咘咘慢慢走上台，慢慢张开嘴巴，唱了一首小星星。声音小小的，但是很好听。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny in pink summer dress standing bravely on the small wooden stage decorated with spring flowers, singing with a gentle small smile, tiny golden star sparkles coming from her mouth, warm spotlight, animal audience watching with loving expressions, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 唱完了，大家都鼓掌了。咘咘笑了——原来，慢慢来，就不那么害怕了。下次再紧张的时候，记得：闻花花，吹泡泡，慢慢来。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny in pink summer dress on stage taking a little bow with the biggest happiest smile, confetti and spring flower petals falling, golden retriever and cow and raccoon and hedgehog and turtle and red bird all clapping enthusiastically in the audience, warm golden sunset light, the most joyful celebratory scene, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536
